Bash(python3 -c " import json, sys d = json.load\(sys.stdin\) def find_logo\(obj, prefix=''\): if isinstance\(obj, dict\): for k, v in obj.items\(\): if 'logo' in str\(k\).lower\(\) or 'favicon' in str\(k\).lower\(\) or 'icon' in str\(k\).lower\(\): print\(f'{prefix}{k}: {str\(v\)[:100]}'\) find_logo\(v, f'{prefix}{k}.'\) elif isinstance\(obj, list\): for i, v in enumerate\(obj[:3]\): find_logo\(v, f'{prefix}[{i}].'\) find_logo\(d\) ")
